verdict: A least-cost greenfield build lands renewable-heavy, the same direction as the DOE pipeline, without being told to: the check is the RE share, not a plant-by-plant match.
costs_note: Generic technology costs, NREL ATB 2024 moderate case, 2022 USD annualized (CRF 0.09) and converted at 56 PhP/USD. Labeled generic, not PH-specific.
disclaimer: Statistical indicators derived from public data. Patterns may have legitimate explanations.
